---
title: "Realizing mission through enhanced effectiveness"
page-layout: full
---

<div class="hero">

<div class="hero-text">
<h1>Casagrande Institute for Higher Education Effectiveness</h1>

<p class="lead">
We help mission-driven colleges and universities align compensation, programs, and leadership practice with long-term sustainability.
</p>

<p>
From faculty and staff compensation to academic program mix analysis and board effectiveness, we support presidents, chief academic officers, and finance leaders who want both financial discipline and a thriving liberal arts mission.
</p>

<p>
<a class="btn-primary" href="services.html">Explore our services</a>
<a class="btn-secondary" href="contact.html">Start a conversation</a>
</p>
</div>

</div>

## What we do

<div class="pill-grid">

<div class="pill">
<h3>Compensation effectiveness</h3>
<p>Design fair, competitive, and sustainable compensation structures for executives, faculty, and staff that reflect institutional values and market realities.</p>
</div>

<div class="pill">
<h3>Academic program mix analysis</h3>
<p>Provide program-level margin and demand context so leaders can make informed choices about investment, maintenance, and teach-out.</p>
</div>

<div class="pill">
<h3>Leadership and governance</h3>
<p>Support boards and senior leaders in clarifying roles, strengthening evaluation processes, and aligning decisions with mission and means.</p>
</div>

</div>

## Trusted by mission-driven institutions

::: {=html}
<div class="client-carousel">
  <div class="carousel-track">
    <img src="images/logos/berea.svg" alt="Berea College">
    <img src="images/logos/landmark.svg" alt="Landmark College">
    <img src="images/logos/ndmu.svg" alt="Notre Dame of Maryland University">
    <img src="images/logos/vanguard.svg" alt="Vanguard University">
    <!-- duplicate sequence for continuous scroll -->
    <img src="images/logos/berea.svg" alt="">
    <img src="images/logos/landmark.svg" alt="">
    <img src="images/logos/ndmu.svg" alt="">
    <img src="images/logos/vanguard.svg" alt="">
  </div>
</div>
:::

*Logos for illustration only. Add or adjust to reflect current clients and partners.*

## How we work

1. **Clarify goals and constraints**  
   Understand mission, context, and non-negotiables.

2. **Use transparent, data-informed methods**  
   Blend quantitative evidence, comparative benchmarks, and stakeholder input.

3. **Co-design practical frameworks**  
   Create structures and tools that leaders, faculty, and staff can understand and explain.

4. **Build internal capacity**  
   Leave behind models, documentation, and processes that your team can maintain.

---

Ready to talk about a project, RFP, or early-stage idea?  
Visit the [Contact](contact.html) page to reach us.
